cmd:
printf "===== HEALTH =====
"; curl -s http://localhost:3000/health; printf "

===== STATUS =====
"; curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/voice/turns -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"text":"kontrolli jarvise seisu","locale":"et-EE","inputMode":"text","outputMode":"text"}'; printf "

===== PM2 =====
"; pm2 status jarvis
output:

{"status":"ok","service":"jarvis-core","timestamp":"2026-04-07T11:40:58.411Z"}

===== STATUS =====
